description: Initializes the bus fetching routine ‘NXTBUS’ for retrieving buses in ascending numerical order. Dummy buses of multisection lines are excluded. Hidden star point buses of three-winding transformers are excluded. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = inibux(ibus)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Starting bus number, 0 for first bus in ordered list. (input).

error_codes.description: Bus not found; ‘NXTBUS’ may not be used.
